metadata.description: AI agent security for Claude Code — read the code, break the running agent, prove it (exploit-validated).

plugins.name: trustshell
plugins.description: Red-team AI agents from inside Claude Code: /static-scan triages an agent's source for candidate vulnerable paths, /red-team attacks a running agent and CONFIRMS what's real with a proof marker, and the agent-red-teamer subagent runs the whole exploit-validated loop. Ships the RT-1..RT-9 attack skills.
